content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the molecule, I can identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 8 (C:8).

**Atom 8 (C) Neighbor Atoms:**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 7 | C |
| 9 | N |
| 18 | N |

**Geomconf_index:** 5597

From the zoomed-in view, atom C:8 is covalently bonded to three atoms:
- **Atom 7 (Carbon)** - connected on the left side
- **Atom 9 (Nitrogen)** - connected below
- **Atom 18 (Nitrogen)** - connected above/right

These three atoms are directly bonded to the central carbon atom (index 8) in this molecular structure.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 8, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
